overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a character walking through a near-future London. The character uses a futuristic teleportation portal, walks along wet autumn streets with iconic red double-decker buses, and enters a glass bus shelter. Features mixed modern and historic architecture under overcast skies with wet pavement reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching futuristic transit portal

events.description: character approaches the glowing teleportation portal structure
character enters the futuristic teleportation portal

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a futuristic glass and metal portal structure on the wet sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic glass and metal portal structure with glowing blue interior
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade dominating the skyline
traditional brown brick building with arched ground floor windows
deciduous trees with yellow and orange autumn foliage lining the sidewalk
black metal railing separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk toward a futuristic teleportation portal. Autumn trees with yellow leaves line the path, while a modern glass skyscraper rises in the background contrasting with a historic brick building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with mixed pedestrian and vehicle traffic

events.description: character exits the teleportation portal on the opposite side of the street
red double-decker bus passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: exiting the portal and walking along the wet city street, navigating through pedestrians and observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: iconic red double-decker bus driving along the street, passing the character from behind

entered.detail: multi-story concrete and glass residential building with grid windows
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights

segments.scene_description: After exiting the portal, the character walks through a busy urban intersection. A classic red double-decker bus passes by on the right, while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The modern skyscraper remains visible to the left as new apartment buildings appear on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk with modern bus shelter

events.description: character approaches the glass-enclosed bus shelter on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the tree-lined sidewalk and entering a glass bus shelter to view the digital advertisement inside

notable_agents.action: person wearing a green jacket and black umbrella walking past the character

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus shelter with transparent walls and red bench inside
tall white and grey high-rise apartment building
illuminated digital screen displaying colorful advertisements on the shelter wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the autumn tree-lined sidewalk, passing pedestrians with umbrellas. Approaching a modern glass bus shelter, the character enters the enclosed space, where digital advertisements are displayed on the interior walls, while the city street remains visible through the transparent glass panels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet, near-future London street that transitions from a high-tech portal crossing to the interior of a glass bus shelter. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk lined with yellow autumn trees, passing between a historic brick building and a modern skyscraper before entering a futuristic teleportation portal. As the character emerges from the portal, the scene opens into a busy urban intersection where a classic red double-decker bus passes by and the architecture shifts toward residential apartment buildings. The camera then follows the character back onto a tree-lined path among pedestrians with umbrellas, moving steadily toward a modern transit stop. Finally, the movement concludes as the character enters a glass bus shelter, shifting the perspective from the open city street to an enclosed space filled with glowing digital advertisements.
